project_type: TypeScript monorepo - 9-app mega-ecosystem with 7 shared packages, expanding to 15 packages
build_system: npm workspaces monorepo - INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network, all code self-contained, no external deps
test_framework: Custom lightweight test runner (node scripts/test.js) - validates file existence, exports, type annotations
verification_instructions: 1. Run node scripts/test.js to validate structure. 2. Verify new files exist with substantial content (200+ lines). 3. Check consistent patterns.
setup_instructions: No setup - Node.js v22 pre-installed. All code written directly with no external deps.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode - NO npm install, NO external packages. All code must be self-contained TypeScript. Use only Node.js built-in APIs. Write complete implementations inline. Files should be 200-400 lines each with real business logic.
contribution_requirements: 1. All frontend must use proper React with hooks (useState, useEffect, useCallback, useMemo, useRef). 2. Backend follows Router -> Controller -> Service -> Model pattern. 3. App AI services delegate to @quant/ai. 4. JWT validation uses @quant/auth TokenService. 5. Each file 200-400 lines with complete logic. 6. Proper TypeScript types and interfaces. 7. Error handling and edge cases.
key_patterns: Backend: Router class, middleware stack (rate limiter, CORS, security, logging, error handler), controller->service pattern with full business logic. Frontend: React.FC with hooks, typed props interfaces, state management with useState/useEffect, loading/error/empty states. Services: Class-based with Maps for in-memory storage, proper async/await, typed returns. Each package has src/index.ts barrel export.
relevant_files: packages/ai/src/core/engine.ts (AI engine pattern - class-based, config, maps, methods)
packages/common/src/types.ts (Type definition pattern - interfaces, type unions)
apps/quantchat/src/pages/index.tsx (React page pattern - hooks, typed props)
directory_structure:
/ - root monorepo
/apps/ - 9 apps (quantchat, quantmail, quantsync, quantads, quantube, quantneon, quantedits, quantmax, quantai)
/packages/ - shared libs (common, database, auth, ai, shared-ui, realtime, server)
/scripts/ - build/dev scripts
Each app: api/ (server.ts, middleware/, routes/, controllers/, services/) + src/ (pages/, components/, services/, types/, hooks/)
Each package: src/index.ts + domain files
